description: Leartech default Renovate preset. Base config every leartech repo extends. Layer go-service.json or angular-app.json on top via extends array.

packageRules.description: Auto-merge patch updates as one grouped PR per week.
Group minor updates for manual review.
Helm chart updates as one PR per cycle.
Docker base image bumps as one PR per cycle. pinDigests above ensures these PRs ALSO open when upstream republishes the same tag.

customManagers.description: Track image: refs in .lighthouse/ pipeline yaml so consumers' catalog task pins (e.g. ghcr.io/mikelear/playwright-runner:0.25.3) get bump PRs.
